articles.title: 4 takeaways from the Revolution’s 3-1 loss to St. Louis City SC
articles.description:
New England started well, but couldn't sustain the momentum.

The post 4 takeaways from the Revolution’s 3-1 loss to St. Louis City SC appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New England Revolution lost 3-1 to St. Louis City SC on March 22.
Revolution started strong but failed to maintain momentum throughout the match.
This loss affects the team's standings and playoff hopes for Boston fans.

articles.title: Don’t be fooled by this fake court notice scam in Mass., NH, authorities warn
articles.description:
The notices may seem legitimate at a first glance, but a closer look reveals that they’re riddled with obvious red flags.

The post Don’t be fooled by this fake court notice scam in Mass., NH, authorities warn appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Authorities warn Boston residents about a fake court notice scam affecting Massachusetts and New Hampshire.
Scammers create convincing notices with multiple red flags to deceive recipients.
Residents are urged to verify court communications to avoid potential financial loss.

articles.title: Defensive press proves too much as Legacy drop their second straight, this time in Houston
articles.description:
Boston hosts the Utah Royals at Gillette Stadium next Saturday.

summary: Legacy lose their second consecutive match against Houston, struggling against defensive pressure.
Boston's Legacy will host the Utah Royals at Gillette Stadium on March 30, 2023.
Local fans can support the team in their upcoming home game to boost morale.

articles.title: The trial of Kelsey Fitzsimmons begins this week. Here’s what to know.
articles.description:
Fitzsimmons, a North Andover police officer, was shot by a colleague in her home last summer.

The post The trial of Kelsey Fitzsimmons begins this week. Here’s what to know. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kelsey Fitzsimmons' trial begins this week after being shot by a colleague last summer.
The incident occurred in her North Andover home, raising concerns about police safety.
Residents are closely watching the trial's outcome for its implications on local law enforcement.

articles.title: It’s not just vaccines — parents are refusing other routine preventive care for newborns
articles.description:
Doctors are alarmed that skepticism fueled by rising anti-science sentiment is increasingly reaching beyond vaccines to other proven, routine, preventive care for babies.

The post It’s not just vaccines — parents are refusing other routine preventive care for newborns appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Doctors report increased refusal of routine newborn care amid rising anti-science sentiment.
Boston pediatricians emphasize the importance of preventive care beyond vaccines for infant health.
Declining preventive care could lead to higher health risks for Boston's newborn population.

articles.title: Welcome to allergy season. Here’s how to protect yourself.
articles.description:
Experts say climate change is leading to longer and more intense allergy seasons, but also point out that treatments for seasonal allergies have become more effective over the last decade.

The post Welcome to allergy season. Here’s how to protect yourself. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Experts warn Boston's allergy season is intensifying due to climate change.
New treatments for seasonal allergies have improved significantly over the last decade.
Residents should prepare for longer allergy seasons affecting health and daily activities.
